name: Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue
title: Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue( dword objectID, long& value ); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue( dbNode implement, dword objectID, long& value ); // form 2
long Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue( dword objectID ); // form 3 deprecated
long Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue( dbNode implement, dword objectID ); // form 4 deprecated
description: The function returns a numeric value of an object. The object must exist in the object pool and must support a numeric value.

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Returns the integer value of the object.

example.code:
LONG val, result
result = Iso11783IL_OPGetNumericValue( 1000, value);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
